hero.title: Matheus Delmaschio
hero.subtitle: Python Automation Analyst | Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
hero.description: Infrastructure professional with over 4 years of experience, specialized in modernizing support operations through DevOps culture and Automation Engineering. Strong experience in Python scripting, containerization (Docker), and building CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Git).

softtek.desc1: Hybrid role in Tier 2/3 technical support and Automation Engineering, transforming critical manual processes into automated, structured workflows.
softtek.desc2: Mission-Critical Automation (Python): Developed a Python solution using Selenium for web automation and CLI/Tkinter interface to process EDI files (DSNOs) integrated with Oracle EBS.
softtek.desc3: Impact: Reduced processing time from 10 minutes per file to seconds (~150 high-value financial files/month — ~$1M USD), eliminating 99% of human error failures.
softtek.desc4: DevOps Culture & CI/CD: Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Gitea, structuring strategic code versioning (dev/prod) and automated deployments via webhooks, along with application containerization using Docker.
softtek.desc5: Documentation Engineering (Docs-as-Code): Structured the team's technical knowledge base by migrating over 1,900 documents to Markdown using MkDocs, optimizing resolution times with full-text search.
softtek.desc6: ITSM Optimization: Automated ServiceNow templates via scripts, standardizing incident closures (Resolution Notes) and improving support metrics and governance.

teleperformance.desc1: Global support in English to corporate clients for advanced troubleshooting within the Microsoft ecosystem (M365, Windows).
teleperformance.desc2: Technical review and validation of internal documentation (KBs), ensuring process precision applied on a global scale with a focus on Customer Experience.

calvo.desc1: Deployment and administration of firewall (pfSense), Proxy (Squid), and endpoint security (Kaspersky).
calvo.desc2: Maintenance and support of Linux/Windows servers and deployment of custom ERP software.

sonolayer.desc1: Created Shell scripts (Bash) for batch configuration automation on Linux servers and workstations.
sonolayer.desc2: Integrated Linux machines into Active Directory and ported Delphi systems (Windows) to Linux via Wine.
sonolayer.desc3: Maintained SQL databases (query and report creation) and administered physical Dell servers.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Support Analyst and DevOps enthusiast passionate about automation
about.bio1: Infrastructure professional with over 4 years of experience, specialized in modernizing support operations through DevOps culture and Automation Engineering. Strong experience in Python scripting, containerization (Docker), and building CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Git), transforming critical manual processes into execution flows in seconds.
about.bio2: Currently working at Softtek, allocated at Cummins, where I act in a hybrid capacity between Tier 2/3 technical support and Automation Engineering, developing robust solutions with Python and Selenium, implementing CI/CD pipelines, and structuring Docs-as-Code knowledge bases via MkDocs.
about.bio3: I seek to work in reliability engineering and infrastructure automation, focusing on transitioning to Cloud environments. I believe in digital transformation as a means to optimize governance, security, and agility in IT operations.
